seoTitle: Why Paraguay: Residency, Tax & Benefits | Lincoln
seoDescription: Why HNW families choose Paraguay: territorial tax, low cost, fast permanent residency and a path to citizenship. How the programme works, explained.
heroLead: One qualifying investment opens the door to permanent residency in the heart of the Southern Cone — and, in time, to a second citizenship by naturalisation. Here is what the Investor Pass is, why Paraguay is uniquely compelling, and how the path actually works.

faqs.question: Is this citizenship by investment?
faqs.answer: No — and this distinction matters. Paraguay does not sell passports. The Investor Pass grants permanent residency by investment; citizenship is obtained later, by naturalisation, after the constitutional period of residence and subject to language, civics and physical-presence requirements.

faqs.question: What is the territorial tax system?
faqs.answer: Under a territorial system, income arising outside Paraguay is generally outside the scope of Paraguayan income tax. Domestic rates are a flat 10%. Legal residency and tax residency are separate questions, assessed on your individual facts.

faqs.question: How is an application handled?
faqs.answer: Applications are prepared end-to-end and submitted in Paraguay, to the standard the competent authorities require, with realistic timelines stated at the outset. Where another route — or another country — would serve you better, that is said plainly.
